author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Winners of the 50th Kodansha Manga Awards
Winners of 50th Kodansha Manga Awards were announced on Monday. The winners of each category are listed in bold alongside other nominated works. Shounen Utsuranain desu by Ruka Konoshima (Weekly Shounen Sunday) Kaoru Hana wa Rin to Saku by Saka Mikami (Magazine Pocket) Gachiakuta by Kei Urana (Weekly Shounen Magazine) Madan no Ichi by Osamu Nishi and Shiro Usazaki (Weekly Shounen Jump) Shoujo Uruwashi no Yoi no Tsuki by Mika Yamamori (Dessert) Shinimodori no Mahou Gakkou Seikatsu wo, Moto Koibit...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Class de 2-banme ni Kawaii Onnanoko to Tomodachi ni Natta' Unveils Supporting Cast, Third Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Takata's Class de 2-banme ni Kawaii Onnanoko to Tomodachi ni Natta (I Became Friends with the Second Cutest Girl in the Class.) light novel unveiled the supporting cast and a third promotional video on Tuesday. The anime premiered on April 7 and airs every Tuesday at 11:30 p.m. on Tokyo MX, followed by KTV and BS Asahi. Cast Nozomu Seki: Rikuya Yasuda (Ikoku Nikki) Itsuki Maehara: Shinji Kawada (Grand Blue) Kyoka Minato: Yurina Am...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Soukou Kihei Votoms: Haiiro no Hexe' Reveals Additional Staff, Second Teaser Trailer, November 2026 Opening
The official website of the Soukou Kihei Votoms: Haiiro no Hexe (Armored Trooper Votoms: Die Graue Hexe) anime revealed additional staff, a second teaser visual (pictured), and second teaser trailer on Tuesday. The anime will premiere as two movies, with the first one scheduled to open in theaters on November 20. Staff Original Story, Supervision: Ryousuke Takahashi (Soukou Kihei Votoms) Original Mechanical Design: Kunio Ookawara (Kidou Senshi Gundam mechanical design) Mechanical Design: Shinobu...
